drwxr-xr-x 2 root   root   4096 Jul 10 08:02 .

Container runs as uid=1000(www-data), host bind-mount owned by uid=0(root) after volume was recreated on new host.
Image: registry.internal/billing-service:latest

$ docker compose ps
eventin-worker-1   Restarting (1) 4 seconds ago
eventin-db-1       Up 10 minutes (healthy)
[2026-07-10 14:19:00] worker | SQLSTATE[HY000] [2002] No route to host — waiting for `db` service (depends_on: condition: service_healthy)
[2026-07-10 14:19:00] worker | Retrying database connection (attempt 14/15)...
[2026-07-10 14:19:00] worker | Max connection attempts reached, exiting with code 143
Suspected cause: `depends_on` healthcheck on `db` passes before MySQL finishes InnoDB crash recovery on restart.

$ docker ps -a | grep spk-saw-umkm-worker-1
spk-saw-umkm-worker-1   registry.internal/spk-saw-umkm:1.3.2   Up 2 minutes (unhealthy)   0.0.0.0:8080->80/tcp

nginx error.log:
  [emerg] bind() to 0.0.0.0:80 failed (98: Address already in use)

Note: two replicas of spk-saw-umkm-worker-1 appear to be racing for the same host port after a `docker compose up --scale` change.
